notes: Versus A.I. (Basic Bot) is live, card draw/DON!! sound effects with a volume slider, animated card movement between zones, turn-start banner and ambient VFX, and a targeting arrow for character/event drags. Plus rules fixes: auto-skip block with no legal Blocker, Life-trigger-to-hand fix, custom deck pick no longer gets cleared before the store loads, and mandatory/optional effect auto-resolve fixes.
